query: Use datocms-setup-build-triggers to add declarative DatoCMS build trigger config plus sync and smoke scripts.
Please run datocms-setup-build-triggers for this Netlify project and scaffold the env placeholders and local smoke checks.
Set up DatoCMS build triggers in this repo with GitLab adapter support and a reusable sync helper.
Write a CMA script to trigger an existing DatoCMS build trigger by id.
Set up DatoCMS webhooks with a local receiver endpoint.
Set up Vercel preview mode and DatoCMS draft mode.
